title: Remove unsafe-inline from an explicit CSP
prompt:
The following CSP has valid syntax but provides effectively zero protection because of `'unsafe-inline'` and `'unsafe-eval'`:

```elixir
%{"content-security-policy" => "default-src * 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'"}
```

Rewrite it to a secure baseline: `default-src 'self'`, no `'unsafe-*'` directives, `object-src 'none'`, `base-uri 'self'`. Write the corrected router to `lib/my_app_web/router.ex` with the full `:browser` pipeline and `put_secure_browser_headers` call.
tier_rationale: Canonical CSP-hardening fix — remove unsafe-* directives.
research_citation: Dan Schultzer: 'We shouldn't opt for the obviously unsafe unsafe-inline... use a nonce for dynamic content that cannot be hashed.'
